expectations.text: Runs or instructs `claude plugin marketplace update ram-companies` before attempting the update
expectations.evidence: Step 1 gives that exact command before anything else.

expectations.text: Asks whether to update at `user` or `project` scope before running the update
expectations.evidence: Step 2 explicitly asks 'should this update apply just to you, or to the whole team?' with both options explained.

expectations.text: Runs or instructs `claude plugin update ram@ram-companies` (with `--scope project` if resolved)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 gives both the plain command and the `--scope project` variant, conditioned on the user's answer.

expectations.text: Suggests verifying the result with `claude plugin list`
expectations.evidence: Step 4 gives that exact command and explains what to check for.
